headline: Coca-Cola Annual Meeting: Shareholders Back Management, Reject Proposals as Braun Replaces Quincey
summary: Coca-Cola (NYSE:KO) shareholders voted to elect directors and approve key management proposals at the company’s 2026 annual meeting, while rejecting all five shareholder proposals, according to preliminary results shared during the virtual event. headline: 6 April Raises With 1 High Yield Giving 20% And 1 Cut
summary: The Rose Income Garden portfolio holds 73 dividend stocks, yielding 6% and beating the SPY year-to-date as XEL and GPC show value. Learn more on the RIG portfolio here.
